items.title: Mascherano quits as Inter Miami head coach
items.summary: Javier Mascherano has quit as Inter Miami head coach, just four months after guiding the club to its first MLS Cup title.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Howie Roseman: We aren't making major changes to how we evaluate offensive linemen in the draft
items.summary: The Eagles had to make a major change on their coaching staff this offseason when offensive line coach Jeff Stoutland stepped down after 13 seasons with the team.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: IPL 2026 schedule - fixtures and results
items.summary: Find out the 2026 IPL schedule, with the opening match on 28 March.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
